ddls:
CREATE TABLE "software_metrics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "branch_count" INTEGER /* Number of branches in the code */,
  "call_pairs" INTEGER /* Number of call pairs in the code */,
  "loc_code_and_comment" INTEGER /* Lines of code count combined with comments */,
  "loc_comments" INTEGER /* Count of comments in the code */,
  "condition_count" INTEGER /* Count of conditions in the code */,
  "cyclomatic_complexity" REAL /* Cyclomatic complexity value */,
  "cyclomatic_density" REAL /* Cyclomatic density calculated value */,
  "decision_count" INTEGER /* Count of decisions made in the code */,
  "decision_density" REAL /* Decision density calculated value */,
  "design_complexity" REAL /* Design complexity value */,
  "design_density" REAL /* Design density calculated value */,
  "edge_count" INTEGER /* Count of edges in the control flow graph */,
  "essential_complexity" REAL /* Essential complexity value */,
  "essential_density" REAL /* Essential density calculated value */,
  "loc_executable" INTEGER /* Lines of code that are executable */,
  "parameter_count" INTEGER /* Count of parameters in functions */,
  "halstead_content" REAL /* Halstead content value */,
  "halstead_difficulty" REAL /* Halstead difficulty value */,
  "halstead_effort" REAL /* Halstead effort value */,
  "halstead_error_est" REAL /* Estimated error based on Halstead metrics */,
  "halstead_length" INTEGER /* Halstead length value */,
  "halstead_level" REAL /* Halstead level value */,
  "halstead_prog_time" REAL /* Estimated programming time based on Halstead metrics */,
  "halstead_volume" REAL /* Halstead volume value */,
  "maintenance_severity" REAL /* Severity of maintenance issues identified */,
  "modified_condition_count" INTEGER /* Count of modified conditions in the code */,
  "multiple_condition_count" INTEGER /* Count of conditions with multiple outcomes */,
  "node_count" INTEGER /* Count of nodes in the control flow graph */,
  "normalized_cyclomatic_complexity" REAL /* Normalized cyclomatic complexity value */,
  "num_operands" INTEGER /* Count of operands used in the code */,
  "num_operators" INTEGER /* Count of operators used in the code */,
  "num_unique_operands" INTEGER /* Count of unique operands used */,
  "num_unique_operators" INTEGER /* Count of unique operators used */,
  "number_of_lines" REAL /* Total lines of code in the file */,
  "percent_comments" INTEGER /* Percentage of lines that are comments */,
  "loc_total" INTEGER /* Total lines of code calculated */,
  "defects" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating presence of defects */,
  "last_analyzed" TEXT /* Timestamp of last analysis performed */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the software project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* Repository URL for the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the project was last modified */,
  "project_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, QA, manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metrics */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES software_metrics ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the issue */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric causing the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to resolve the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES software_metrics ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being analyzed */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric that was analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the metrics analysis */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_analysis_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_analysis_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES software_metrics ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., developer, manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metrics" (
  "project_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project-metric link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric associated with the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES software_metrics ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., issue, metric update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "field_changed" TEXT /* Field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)
